# `lr-flow-run-overlay`

- **Import** `import '@aceshooting/lyra-ui/components/data/flow-run-overlay/flow-run-overlay.js';` (registers the tag; side-effect import)
- **Class** `LyraFlowRunOverlay`, also available unregistered from `@aceshooting/lyra-ui/components/data/flow-run-overlay/flow-run-overlay.class.js`
- **Family** `components/data/` ŌĆö see `llms/index.md` for its siblings
- **Optional peers** none
- **Themeable via** 4 parts, 0 custom properties ŌĆö see this component's own `@csspart`/`@cssprop` list below
- **Library-wide behavior** (events, form association, `locale`/`strings`, tokens, TS types): `llms/shared.md`

## `lr-flow-run-overlay`

Execution-state presentation for a `lr-flow-canvas`: pushes a `FlowRunDecorations` map into the
resolved canvas (the canvas itself renders the node/edge paint) and renders a compact run-summary
strip. Does not execute, poll, or time anything ŌĆö pure pushed state; `durationMs` is host-computed.

**Properties:**
- `for: string = ''` ŌĆö id of the target `lr-flow-canvas`; empty resolves to the nearest ancestor
- `decorations: FlowRunDecorations = {}` (attribute: false) ŌĆö `Record<nodeOrEdgeId,
  FlowRunDecoration>`, pushed verbatim onto the resolved canvas's own `decorations` property
- `hideSummary: boolean = false` (attribute `hide-summary`) ŌĆö omits the "{done} of {total} steps
  complete" strip, keeping only the decoration push
- `label: string = ''` ŌĆö accessible name for the summary strip
- `appearance: 'card'|'plain' = 'card'` (reflected) ŌĆö `'plain'` removes the border, background,
  shadow, padding and radius, so a summary strip dropped straight into a host toolbar that already
  draws its own frame does not double it. `'card'` is the standalone floating-strip presentation and
  is unchanged.

**Events:** none dispatched directly.

**Slots:** default ŌĆö extra host chrome appended to the strip (e.g. a cancel button or a usage
badge).

**CSS parts:** `base`, `summary` (the "{done} of {total} steps complete" line), `count` (one per
status present, text + tone dot, never color-only), `live-region` (step-transition announcement).

**Themeable custom properties:** shared tokens only.

**Optional peer deps:** none.

```html
<lr-flow-canvas id="canvas" style="height:480px">
  <lr-flow-run-overlay slot="top-start" for="canvas"></lr-flow-run-overlay>
</lr-flow-canvas>
<script>
  document.querySelector('lr-flow-run-overlay').decorations = {
    a: { status: 'success', durationMs: 820 },
    b: { status: 'running', progress: 40 },
  };
</script>
```

**Known gotchas:**
- Purely a pushed-state conduit: it never starts, stops, or times a run itself ŌĆö the host recomputes
  `decorations` (including `durationMs`) on whatever cadence its own execution engine ticks at.
- `for` resolution matches `lr-flow-minimap`/`lr-flow-controls`.
